nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: Príncipe weaver
nodes.summary: Príncipe weaver（Ploceus princeps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Príncipe weaver。

nodes.name: Príncipe weaver
nodes.summary: The Príncipe weaver (Ploceus princeps) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to São Tomé and Príncipe, where it is found on the island of Príncipe. It was described by Charles Lucien Bonaparte in 1851. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References External links Principe Golden Weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
